speaker: speaker1
text: I'm going to go shopping for groceries in a little bit .

speaker: speaker1
text: I believe we are all out of food .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you know what to get ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't know what we need .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why don't you go and check the refrigerator ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I would appreciate it if you would do that for me .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why don't you just get the basics ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Eggs , milk , bread . Things like that .
